mapper.select: SELECT lc.*, lmo.material_name as lamination_material_name, lmo.description as lamination_material_description, ppo.step_name as post_processing_step_name FROM lamination_compatibility lc LEFT JOIN lamination_material_options lmo ON lc.lamination_material_id = lmo.id LEFT JOIN post_processing_options ppo ON lc.post_processing_step_id = ppo.id ORDER BY lc.id DESC
SELECT * FROM lamination_material_options ORDER BY is_active DESC, display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM post_processing_options ORDER BY is_active DESC, display_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT lc.*, lmo.material_name as lamination_material_name, lmo.description as lamination_material_description, ppo.step_name as post_processing_step_name FROM lamination_compatibility lc LEFT JOIN lamination_material_options lmo ON lc.lamination_material_id = lmo.id LEFT JOIN post_processing_options ppo ON lc.post_processing_step_id = ppo.id WHERE lc.id = #{id}

SELECT lc.*, lmo.material_name as lamination_material_name, lmo.description as lamination_material_description, ppo.step_name as post_processing_step_name FROM lamination_compatibility lc LEFT JOIN lamination_material_options lmo ON lc.lamination_material_id = lmo.id LEFT JOIN post_processing_options ppo ON lc.post_processing_step_id = ppo.id WHERE lc.foil_series = #{foilSeries} AND lc.lamination_material_id = #{laminationMaterialId}
AND (lc.model_number = #{modelNumber} OR (lc.model_number IS NULL AND #{modelNumber} = ''))
AND lc.model_number IS NULL
AND (lc.product_type = #{productType} OR (lc.product_type IS NULL AND #{productType} = ''))
AND lc.product_type IS NULL
AND (lc.post_processing_step_id = #{postProcessingStepId} OR (lc.post_processing_step_id IS NULL AND #{postProcessingStepId} = 0))
AND lc.post_processing_step_id IS NULL
ORDER BY lc.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE lamination_compatibility SET compatibility = #{compatibility}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE lamination_compatibility SET foil_series = #{foilSeries}, interface_type_id = #{interfaceTypeId}, post_processing_step_id = #{postProcessingStepId}, lamination_material_id = #{laminationMaterialId}, compatibility = #{compatibility}, product_type = #{productType}, model_number = #{modelNumber}, is_jiehuo = #{isJiehuo}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lamination_compatibility ( foil_series, interface_type_id, post_processing_step_id, lamination_material_id, compatibility, product_type, model_number, is_jiehuo, notice_ids ) VALUES ( #{foilSeries}, #{interfaceTypeId}, #{postProcessingStepId}, #{laminationMaterialId}, #{compatibility}, #{productType}, #{modelNumber}, #{isJiehuo}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler} ) ON CONFLICT (foil_series, lamination_material_id, model_number_key, post_processing_step_id, product_type) DO UPDATE SET interface_type_id = EXCLUDED.interface_type_id, compatibility = EXCLUDED.compatibility, product_type = EXCLUDED.product_type, model_number = EXCLUDED.model_number, is_jiehuo = EXCLUDED.is_jiehuo, notice_ids = EXCLUDED.notice_ids, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO lamination_compatibility ( foil_series, interface_type_id, post_processing_step_id, lamination_material_id, compatibility, product_type, model_number, is_jiehuo ) VALUES
( #{item.foilSeries}, #{item.interfaceTypeId}, #{item.postProcessingStepId}, #{item.laminationMaterialId}, #{item.compatibility}, #{item.productType}, #{item.modelNumber}, #{item.isJiehuo} )
ON CONFLICT (foil_series, lamination_material_id, model_number_key, post_processing_step_id, product_type) DO UPDATE SET interface_type_id = EXCLUDED.interface_type_id, compatibility = EXCLUDED.compatibility, product_type = EXCLUDED.product_type, model_number = EXCLUDED.model_number, is_jiehuo = EXCLUDED.is_jiehuo, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM lamination_compatibility WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT foil_series FROM lamination_compatibility WHERE foil_series IS NOT NULL AND foil_series != '' ORDER BY foil_series
SELECT DISTINCT product_type FROM lamination_compatibility WHERE product_type IS NOT NULL AND product_type != '' ORDER BY product_type
SELECT DISTINCT model_number FROM lamination_compatibility WHERE model_number IS NOT NULL AND model_number != '' ORDER BY model_number
mapper.update: UPDATE lamination_compatibility SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
